news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com indicates that the Chile Construction Market is set to experience growth in various sectors. The report forecasts a 2.5% real terms growth in Chile's construction industry by 2025. This growth will be primarily driven by investments in sectors such as transport infrastructure, mining, and energy. The report focuses on segments including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets, with the analysis extending until 2029. This positive outlook is attributed to investments in renewable energy initiatives by trade partners.
news.headline: Chile construction industry to grow by 2.5% in real terms in 2025, supported by investments in transport infrastructure, mining, and energy sector.

news.summary: Ride-sharing company Uber Technologies, Inc (NYSE: UBER) released its fiscal first-quarter 2025 results, showing a 14% year-on-year growth in quarterly revenue to $11.53 billion. This figure fell slightly short of the analyst consensus of $11.62 billion. The company reported an adjusted EPS of 83 cents, surpassing the analyst estimate of 50 cents. Despite the positive EPS, the stock price dropped post-announcement. Revenue from Mobility increased to $6.5 billion, marking a 15% growth year-on-year, while Delivery revenue reached $3.78 billion, up by 18%, and Freight revenue was reported at $1.26 billion, showing a 2% decline year-on-year. The company's Gross Bookings saw a 14% year-on-year increase, totaling $42.82 billion. Mobility Gross Bookings amounted to $21.18 billion, up by 13% year-on-year.
news.headline: Uber reports Q1 2025 results: 14% revenue growth to $11.53B, beating adjusted EPS at 83 cents. Mobility revenue hit $6.5B. Stock declined post report.

news.summary: A popular fast-casual restaurant has recently unveiled its very first side dish, the Tuscan Summer Salad, and also reintroduced the Blueberry Basil Lemonade. Salad and Go, a unique salad chain focused on providing fresh and healthy food at an accessible price point, introduced these new offerings. This move took place in Dallas on May 7, 2025. Salad and Go is known for its commitment to making nutritious meals convenient and affordable for everyone.
news.headline: Salad and Go introduces new Tuscan Summer Salad and brings back Blueberry Basil Lemonade to its summer menu in 2025.

news.summary: Republic Services, Inc. revealed that Antonio (Tony) Carranza from the San Diego area was honored as the 2025 National Residential Driver by the National Waste & Recycling Association for his dedication to safety and service. This recognition highlights Carranza's exceptional commitment in the collection truck driver field. The award was announced on May 7, 2025, in Phoenix. Republic Services, Inc., traded on the NYSE under RSG, commended Carranza for his outstanding performance in the industry.
news.headline: Antonio Carranza named 2025 Residential Driver of the Year by National Waste & Recycling Association for safety and service.

news.summary: Pocketbook Agency, a women-owned and led boutique recruiting firm based in Los Angeles, achieved a significant milestone by receiving national recognition from Forbes. This marks the firm's continued success as it secures a spot on Forbes' esteemed list. This acknowledgment solidifies Pocketbook Agency's position as a prominent player in the recruiting sector. The recent achievement underscores the company's dedication to excellence and highlights its standing in the industry.
news.headline: Pocketbook Agency has made it to the Forbes America's Best Professional Recruiting Firms 2025 list, marking their rise as a top boutique firm. Los Angeles, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, a recent announcement reveals YuJa's introduction of the Panorama Workflow Orchestration Module, a robust project management feature integrated into the YuJa Panorama platform.
news.headline: YuJa, Inc. introduces Panorama Workflow Orchestration Module to streamline accessibility task management within YuJa Panorama.

news.summary: A recent consumer perception study by Citruslabs revealed that the majority of participants noticed a decrease in pain and an increase in playful behavior in their cats after six weeks. The study, conducted in Chicago, involved participants using personal care products for pet health. The findings indicate a positive impact on cats' well-being, underscoring the effectiveness of these products.
news.headline: Study by Citruslabs shows Knead Therapeutic Cat Bed eases feline arthritis symptoms: 70% saw less pain, increased mobility.

news.summary: SeaWorld is inviting families to dive into summer fun with a new animated music video featuring the viral kids hit "Baby Shark." Created in partnership with Pinkfong, the video celebrates a decade of doo-doo-doo excitement. The collaboration aims to bring joy to audiences worldwide. Visual assets for the video are accessible online. This initiative reflects SeaWorld's dedication to providing entertaining experiences. The project, launched on May 7, 2025 in Orlando, promises to be a sensation with its catchy tune.
news.headline: SeaWorld partners with Pinkfong, Baby Shark for educational sing-along video showcasing marine life. Celebrate a decade with doo-doo-doo fun!

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on May 7, 2025, BOLD Precious Metals, a prominent bullion dealer, has recently unveiled a cutting-edge digital bullion portfolio tool. Recognized for their innovation and extensive product offerings, the company aims to enhance customer experience with this new tool. This multi-functional digital platform provides various features and services, catering to the diverse needs of investors and collectors. The tool is designed to streamline and optimize the management of precious metal investments, offering a comprehensive solution for tracking and analyzing holdings. With this launch, BOLD Precious Metals underscores its commitment to leveraging technology for the benefit of its clients, demonstrating a strategic focus on staying ahead in the competitive bullion market.
news.headline: BOLD introduces digital bullion portfolio for investors, leading bullion dealer, offers innovative tool for tracking investments.

news.summary: A gathering has been organized in Charleston, South Carolina on May 7, 2025, for K-12 customers to engage face-to-face and maximize their usage of Blackbaud software. This event offers a chance for participants to connect in person and make the most of their experience with Blackbaud, a prominent software provider focusing on driving social impact. The company, listed under NASDAQ as BLKB, is eager to reintroduce this opportunity for its users.
news.headline: Blackbaud plans K-12 user conference in 2026 for in-person connections and software enhancement.

news.summary: Los Angeles, May 7, 2025 - Celebrity Paris Hilton introduces Parívie, a new high-end skincare range for individuals with an active lifestyle. The line offers next-generation formulas for constant skin protection with advanced features for modern living. The launch has garnered significant attention and anticipation in the beauty industry.
news.headline: Paris Hilton launches Parívie skincare line for always-on skin, aiming to redefine luxury beauty. (Characters: 91)

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Chicago, Hanx Biopharmaceuticals Ltd. (HanxBio), a leading biotechnology company in clinical stages, showcased its growing pipeline of treatments for oncology and autoimmune diseases at the 2025 American conference. The company shared insights through five research poster presentations, emphasizing its commitment to developing innovative immunotherapies.
news.headline: Hanx Biopharmaceuticals presents 5 cancer therapies at 2025 AACR meeting in Chicago, showcasing innovations.

news.summary: A top InsurTech company has showcased its newest advancements in its all-in-one platform at Accelerate, hosted by NetVU. On May 7, 2025, Vertafore®, a pioneer in contemporary insurance technology, demonstrated its efforts to transform the tech landscape for independent agencies.
news.headline: Vertafore unveils latest innovations for independent agencies at Accelerate event, demonstrates vision for connected agencies.

news.summary: USO has received recognition for its work in supporting military families, including a special halftime ceremony and donation, at Audi Field in McLean, VA on May 7, 2025. Guidehouse, a global firm offering advisory, technology, and managed services to commercial and public sectors, partnered with the United Service Organizations (USO) for this event. The details of the donation amount were not specified in the provided information.
news.headline: Guidehouse, USO, and D.C. United partner for Military Appreciation Night with a special donation, ceremony, and commitments.

news.summary: Sarepta Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SRPT) reported a loss in the first quarter, with earnings per share at $3.42, significantly below the expected 95 cents according to analysts. Despite this, the company exceeded revenue expectations, bringing in $744.86 million compared to the estimated $683.36 million. The first quarter saw a notable rise in net product revenue to $611.5 million, marking a 70% increase from the previous year, aided by the PMO franchise generating $236.5 million and ELEVIDYS reaching $375 million, a 180% growth year-over-year. The company cited facing challenges during the quarter. For a detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Sarepta Therapeutics reports Q1 loss of $3.42 per share, beats revenue estimates at $744.86 million. PMO franchise at $236.5 million.

(Nasdaq: ALKT), a prominent provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions for U.S. financial institutions, revealed that its executive leadership is scheduled to speak at the 53rd Annual J.P. Morgan event. This signifies a significant opportunity for the company to showcase its expertise to a broader audience.

news.summary: The company Lipogems has recently finished the ARISE I U.S. FDA IDE Study, with the final patient completing their last visit. This event signifies a significant achievement in the development of Lipogems for knee treatment. The study's successful completion is a crucial step forward, marking a milestone for the company in its efforts to advance medical solutions.
news.headline: Lipogems completes ARISE 1 U.S. FDA IDE Study for knee osteoarthritis, with last patient's last visit concluded.

news.summary: Miro®, the Innovation Workspace, has introduced its Solution Partner Program in both San Francisco and Amsterdam. This program features a selected group of transformation experts with diverse industry knowledge and skills. These partners offer strategic advisory services, implementation support, and custom development options to aid businesses in enhancing their operations and achieving better results. The program aims to address key challenges faced by organizations seeking to innovate and improve efficiency.
news.headline: Miro launches Solution Partner Program to provide advisory and implementation services, supporting enterprise innovation.

news.summary: Balance, a financial infrastructure platform for B2B commerce based in New York, has introduced Instant Bank Connection. This new feature leverages Real-Time Payment (RTP) rails to streamline ACH setup for buyers, enhancing the speed of payments to merchants. By utilizing Instant Bank Connection, the platform aims to enhance cash flow and lower processing expenses. Despite being a cost-efficient method within B2B payments, the adoption of ACH has been hindered by outdated onboarding processes, including complex logins and mu...
news.headline: Balance integrates RTP rails for B2B ACH payments, launching Instant Bank Connection to improve cash flow, reduce processing costs.

news.summary: Today, in Geneva, Switzerland, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) revealed that its QVault TPM product is now compliant with ML-DSA-87 and ML-KEM-1024, utilizing the NIST-standardized CRYSTALS-Dilithium and Kyber algorithms for enhanced security. This achievement solidifies SEALSQ's reputation as a reliable supplier of quantum-resistant security solutions. The QVault TPM caters to the rigorous security needs of various sectors, such as defense, IoT, automotive, and telecommunications, highlighting its effectiveness in safeguarding sensitive information.
news.headline: SEALSQ Corp announces QVault TPM now compliant with ML-DSA-87 & ML-KEM-1024, leveraging NIST-standardized algorithms for quantum-resistant protection.

news.summary: The Tech 200 report for 2025, released by T3 Sixty, a top management consultancy in residential real estate, highlights a significant focus on AI adoption and market consolidation this year. The report also showcases the emergence of 20 new companies, emphasizing a continued push for innovation in the industry. This year's Tech 200 reveals key trends shaping the sector, indicating a strong presence of technological advancements and a growing competitive landscape.
news.headline: T3 Sixty reveals 2025 Tech 200, spotlights top real estate tech. Features AI adoption, 20 new firms.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company Liquid Web, known for its dedicated servers and hosting solutions for SMBs, will host a free live webinar on May 7, 2025. The webinar, titled "Intro to GPU Hosting with NVIDIA," aims to assist IT professionals and developers interested in GPU hosting. Liquid Web specializes in WordPress, VPS, and GPU hosting, catering to small to medium-sized businesses.
news.headline: Liquid Web offers free webinar on GPU hosting with NVIDIA to empower SMBs. Scheduled on May 7, 2025 in Atlanta.

news.summary: Fiverr International (NYSE: FVRR) announced its fiscal first-quarter 2025 results, with quarterly sales increasing by 14.6% year-on-year to $107.2 million, outperforming the analyst consensus of $106.1 million. The company also posted adjusted earnings per share of 64 cents, surpassing the analyst estimate of 59 cents. Active buyers as of March 31 stood at 3.5 million, down from 4 million the previous year, while the spend per buyer grew by 8.8% to $309. For more details, refer to the article on Benzinga.com about Fiverr exceeding expectations in Q4, predicting AI-driven expansion, and a rise in buyer spending.
news.headline: Fiverr surpasses Q1 estimates with $107.2M in sales, 14.6% YoY growth, active buyers at 3.5M, $309 spend per buyer.

news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between Baltimore City Public Schools and LINQ, headquartered in Wilmington, North Carolina, aiming to enhance student meal programs and operational efficiency. The partnership is geared towards streamlining operations within the school system to provide improved services for students.
news.headline: Baltimore City Public Schools partners with LINQ to modernize nutrition operations, improving student meal programs.

news.summary: Theriva Biologics, a clinical-stage company focused on developing cancer therapeutics, recently announced the pricing of its public offering. The offering includes up to 6,818,180 shares of common stock and warrants at an offering price of $1.10 per share, aiming to generate approximately $7.5 million in gross proceeds. The warrants will have an exercise price of $1.10 per share and a five-year expiration period from the issuance date. Theriva aims to address high unmet needs in cancer treatment through this initiative.
news.headline: Theriva Biologics prices $7.5M public offering of 6,818,180 shares at $1.10/share, to treat cancer.

news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on May 7, 2025, Healthcare Funding Partners (HFP), a prominent insurance platform, has successfully acquired GetMeHealthcare. This acquisition signifies GetMeHealthcare's status as a key platform company under HFP's umbrella, consolidating HFP's position to spearhead initiatives across the nation.
news.headline: Healthcare Funding Partners acquires GetMeHealthcare, strengthening insurance platform. Growth projected nationwide.

news.summary: The HR AI Assistant Galileo®, developed by The Josh Bersin Company, can now be accessed by over 4,400 organizations through integration with the HiBob HR platform. This collaboration aims to provide top-notch HR and manager tools to the mid-market sector, which has historically lacked adequate professional HR support.
news.headline: Josh Bersin's Galileo now offered to 4,400+ HiBob customers globally. HR AI assistant brings tools to mid-market.

news.summary: A new Disney destination is set to become the company's seventh worldwide, expanding its global presence and engaging fresh audiences in a vibrant hub. This collaboration underscores Abu Dhabi's ongoing dedication to sustainable development, emphasizing travel and tourism as vital aspects of a prosperous future. This initiative reflects a significant milestone and opportunity for growth in Abu Dhabi, showcasing its potential as a key player in the tourism sector.
news.headline: Disney and Miral plan to build a theme park in Abu Dhabi, the 7th Disney destination, showcasing sustainable growth.

news.summary: A company based in Beverly, Massachusetts, Tobin Scientific, known for offering cGMP storage, biorepository services, and specialized logistics for the life sciences sector, revealed the successful conclusion of a substantial capital raise on May 7, 2025. This funding boost aims to fuel the company's upcoming expansion phase.
news.headline: Tobin Scientific secures $65M investment for life sciences expansion. Major boost for growth plans.

news.summary: Austin, TX - On May 7, 2025, Alafair Biosciences, Inc., a top player in hydrogel technology for medical purposes, proudly shared its inclusion in the 2025 Longhorn 100 list. This exclusive list acknowledges the rapid growth of businesses headed by alumni from The University of Texas.
news.headline: Alafair Biosciences ranked #2 on the 2025 Longhorn 100 list of fastest-growing Longhorn-led businesses in Austin, Texas.

news.summary: The Entrepreneur Of The Year award honors visionary entrepreneurs influencing the future in AUSTIN, Texas. Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) has revealed the finalists for the esteemed Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Gulf South Award. The finalists were recognized at an event last night.
news.headline: EY US names Dr. Lefteris Ntouanoglou of Schoox as Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 Gulf South Award Finalist.
